title: tribolium alternans
intro: Tribolium alternans, also known as Alternanthera tribuloides, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Tribolium alternans include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Tribolium alternans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
